# PERF-83 negative: StructScan with a typed destination via db.Select
lang: go
file: PERF-083-safe.go
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct {
	ID    int64  `db:"id"`
	Email string `db:"email"`
}

func ListUsers(db *sqlx.DB) ([]User, error) {
	var users []User
	err := db.Select(&users, "SELECT id, email FROM users")
	return users, err
}
